channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: twentyhq /twenty | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Building a modern alternative to Salesforce, powered by the community.

item.title: moeru-ai /airi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

item.title: fastfetch-cli /fastfetch | C | N/A
item.description: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

item.title: shareAI-lab /learn-claude-code | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

item.title: hacksider /Deep-Live-Cam | Python | N/A
item.description: real time face swap and one-click video deepfake with only a single image

item.title: thedotmack /claude-mem | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: OpenBB-finance /OpenBB | Python | N/A
item.description: Financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents.

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: luongnv89 /claude-howto | Python | N/A
item.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
